name: epydios-agentops-vscode
description: VS Code governed-thread review client for the shared EpydiosOps runtime contract.

commands.title: EpydiosOps: Open Thread By Task ID

agentops.runtimeApiBaseUrl.description: Base URL for the EpydiosOps runtime API.

agentops.tenantId.description: Optional tenant filter for governed thread listing.

agentops.projectId.description: Optional project filter for governed thread listing.

agentops.authToken.markdownDescription: Optional bearer token for runtime API requests. Leave blank for local unauthenticated development.

agentops.liveFollowWaitSeconds.description: Long-poll wait time for native session event follow in seconds.

agentops.includeLegacySessions.description: Include legacy projected sessions when loading thread review.

scripts.check: node --check extension.js && node --check lib/runtimeClient.js && node --check lib/sessionReview.js && node --check lib/threadContext.js && node --check lib/updateEnvelope.js && node --check lib/reportEnvelope.js && node --check lib/handoffSummary.js && node --check bin/vscode_governed_thread_acceptance.js
